Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}So if there's leftovers, we can keep them in the fridge.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}But, we're cooking for two today, so there probably won't be leftovers.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Oh, I forgot to mention, but I'm making katsudon.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Make sure to eat it all, no matter how it tastes.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}If you don't want it, I could put the meat away... But that's a pain, so just eat it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}Well, I'm makin' this to thank you, so I'm not gonna give you somethin' terrible.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 3 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}{f 4 23 0 10 3 25 25}...I said I'd thank you, but this place ain't equipped to make that.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 4 23 0 10 0 25 25}I want somethin' with rice. So we're havin' katsudon today, got it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}Alright then, time to get started.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}The rice is already cooked, so just scoop everything into a bowl once it's ready.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}...I like extra large portions, by the way.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I watched Aragaki cook. His skill is on[n]par with that of a professional chef...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The katsudon is ready.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Crunchy, flaky breaded pork, topped with[n]half-cooked egg... I could eat this all day![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}Anyone can make this, long as they practice.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}Today we just had the rice and toppings, but you could add side dishes too...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}Well, give it a try when you have time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}Alright, I did my part to thank you. You handle the cleanup.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}We're havin' katsudon again, got it?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}...Don't give me that look. We got a lot of pork 'cause it was cheap.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}Part of me thinks startin' with fried food might be hard, but the basics are pretty much the same.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}You're a real oddball, you know that? Askin' me to teach you how to cook.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}Why do you wanna learn so much?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 3 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}{f 4 23 0 10 4 25 25}You don't really think things through, do you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}Well, we all got our own reasons...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}Can't hurt to know this stuff. But you better put in the work if you wanna be popular.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}I was taught how to cook by someone else too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}So, when I see someone who wants to learn, I can kinda relate.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}Alright, that's enough rambling. Let's get started.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}...You're gonna do it this time. So first, get the meat ready.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}When you're frying something, stick a chopstick in the oil and check for little bubbles.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 39 0 0}Wait, you're putting on too much heat. The meat ain't gonna taste good if it's too tough.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}{f 4 23 0 10 1 25 25}Pretty good job, considering it was your first try.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 41 0 0}{f 4 23 0 10 0 25 25}You've still got room for improvement though. Especially in the way you handle the knife and fryer...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 42 0 0}But if you're serious about it, then just practice.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 44 0 0}You ain't done cooking until everything's put away, so don't slack off.[n]{f 1 1}
